Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Axciss]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Axciss is the City of Champions located on the Izyrian continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Axciss contains a gladiator's arena where criminals are sentenced to death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Calder and Jerri have few acquaintances in Axciss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Axciss is a city in Izyria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Axciss is a location where there will be a hunt for unregistered alchemists following an explosion at the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — The crew visited the arena upon reaching Axciss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Axciss is a location located three days from Calder's current position.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Axciss is a location mentioned by the old man.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Nakothi has choices from Axciss.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Rebels are active in Axciss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Axciss is a location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The situation in Axciss was described as urgent.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
